title: Wyper Keeps Fighting
description: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
scene: Across pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this scene centers on Nico Robin, Nola, Enel, Nami, Aisa. Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: Oh! It seems that a bug

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: has reached the edge of the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sue! What's wrong? Are you hurt?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Were you held prisoner by God enel!?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: ... What happened....!? Conis-san, get some bandages.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: There is... NO TIME...!!! Tell everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All the citizens of the sky!!!

summary: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
